title: 劳埃德银行透露， IT故障影响了近50万客户
originalTitle: Lloyds bank reveals IT glitch affected almost half a million customers
summary: 在给财政部特别委员会的一封信中，劳埃德表示道歉，并表示已经支付了一些赔偿金。
originalSummary: In a letter to the Treasury Select Committee, Lloyds apologised and said some compensation had been paid.
